assessor_1_raw: IT support retrieval: well-designed with temporal split, expert label audit, and stratified secondary metrics. Recall@10 is appropriate for multi-label retrieval. Metadata ablation isolates semantic understanding from metadata exploitation. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Sound retrieval experiment. Both models receive equal tuning with same primary metric. Bootstrap CIs provide uncertainty quantification. Vocabulary drift check is an honest transparency measure. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses stratified Recall@10 by article popularity quintile to detect confounded performance on high-frequency articles. Expert spot check of 200-300 tickets validates labels. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
